_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
condition: Joint pathology requiring exploration or drainage
min_doctor_qualification: Diploma in Orthopedics with 10 years of experience

preauth.label: X-ray labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/ Right) of affected part

claim.label: Post-procedure X-ray labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right) of affected part

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes with indication for surgery submitted?
X-ray labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right) of affected part is indicative of surgery?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed ICPs with daily vitals and treatment details?
Post-procedure X-ray labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right) of affected part submitted?
Are the detailed procedure / Operative Notes available?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?

common_queries: Clinical findings and X-ray report not indicative of surgery
Clinical notes with indication for surgery not submitted
X-ray labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right) of affected part not indicative of surgery
Clinical photograph of affected part not submitted or unclear
Detailed ICPs with daily vitals and treatment details not provided
Post-procedure X-ray (labelled with patient ID, date and side) of affected part not submitted
Detailed Procedure / Operative Notes not available
Discharge summary with follow-up advice not provided at discharge

clinical_key_pointers: An arthrotomy is a surgical exploration of a joint, which should include inspection of the cartilage, intra-articular structures, joint capsule, and ligaments.
